00027 #ifndef JELATINE_FIELD_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_FIELD_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "classfile.h"
00033 
00034 // Forward declarations
00035 
00036 struct class_t;
00037 
00038 /******************************************************************************
00039  * Field types definitions                                                    *
00040  ******************************************************************************/
00041 
00044 struct field_t {
00045     const char *name; 
00046     const char *descriptor; 
00047     uint16_t access_flags; 
00048     int16_t offset; 
00049 };
00050 
00052 typedef struct field_t field_t;
00053 
00056 struct static_field_t {
00057     union {
00058         int8_t jbyte;
00059         uint16_t jchar;
00060         int16_t jshort;
00061         int32_t jint;
00062         int64_t jlong;
00063 #if JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00064         float jfloat;
00065         double jdouble;
00066 #endif // JEL_FP_SUPPORT
00067         uintptr_t jref;
00068     } data; 
00069     field_t *field; 
00070 };
00071 
00073 typedef struct static_field_t static_field_t;
00074 
00075 /******************************************************************************
00076  * Field interface                                                            *
00077  ******************************************************************************/
00078 
00079 extern size_t field_size(const field_t *);
00080 extern void field_parse_descriptor(const char *);
00081 extern uintptr_t static_field_data_ptr(static_field_t *);
00082 
00083 /******************************************************************************
00084  * Field inlined functions                                                    *
00085  ******************************************************************************/
00086 
00091 static inline bool field_is_static(const field_t *field)
00092 {
00093     return field->access_flags & ACC_STATIC;
00094 } // field_is_static()
00095 
00100 static inline bool field_is_private(const field_t *field)
00101 {
00102     return field->access_flags & ACC_PRIVATE;
00103 } // field_is_private()
00104 
00109 static inline bool field_is_protected(const field_t *field)
00110 {
00111     return field->access_flags & ACC_PROTECTED;
00112 } // field_is_protected()
00113 
00118 static inline bool field_is_public(const field_t *field)
00119 {
00120     return field->access_flags & ACC_PUBLIC;
00121 } // field_is_public()
00122 
00127 static inline bool field_is_reference(const field_t *field)
00128 {
00129     return (field->descriptor[0] == '[') || (field->descriptor[0] == 'L');
00130 } // field_is_public()
00131 
00132 /******************************************************************************
00133  * Field iterators                                                            *
00134  ******************************************************************************/
00135 
00138 struct field_iterator_t {
00139     field_t *next; 
00140     field_t *end; 
00141     bool stat; 
00142 };
00143 
00145 typedef struct field_iterator_t field_iterator_t;
00146 
00147 /******************************************************************************
00148  * Field iterators interface                                                  *
00149  ******************************************************************************/
00150 
00151 extern field_iterator_t field_itr(struct class_t *, bool);
00152 extern field_t *field_itr_get_next(field_iterator_t *);
00153 
00154 /******************************************************************************
00155  * Field iterators inlined functions                                          *
00156  ******************************************************************************/
00157 
00162 static inline field_iterator_t instance_field_itr(struct class_t *cl)
00163 {
00164     return field_itr(cl, false);
00165 } // instance_field_itr()
00166 
00171 static inline field_iterator_t static_field_itr(struct class_t *cl)
00172 {
00173     return field_itr(cl, true);
00174 } // static_field_itr()
00175 
00180 static inline bool field_itr_has_next(field_iterator_t itr)
00181 {
00182     return (itr.next != NULL);
00183 } // field_itr_has_next()
00184 
00185 #endif // !JELATINE_FIELD_H
